description_long: This is a simple, utilitarian fence constructed from three horizontal rails supported by two vertical posts. A single diagonal brace runs from the lower left to the upper right, providing additional structural stability. The fence appears to be made of a uniform, muted gray material, likely painted or coated metal or wood. The top edge of the fence is flat, and the posts terminate without any decorative caps or finials. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, giving the fence a functional and industrial appearance. The overall design is robust and straightforward, suitable for use in urban or suburban environments to demarcate boundaries or restrict access.
description: A plain gray fence with three horizontal rails, two posts, and a diagonal brace for support. The design is simple, sturdy, and lacks decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three horizontal rails, the two posts, and the diagonal brace clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the rails and posts.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the diagonal brace running in the opposite direction visually.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the rails and posts.
